/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-g++-8 -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest.so -o libgtest.so CMakeFiles/gtest.dir/src/gtest-all.cc.o   -L/home/warp/catkin_ws/src/rover_base/rover_gps_widget/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src  -Wl,-rpath,/home/warp/catkin_ws/src/rover_base/rover_gps_widget/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -lpthread
